headline: Peaceful Assembly Act bars 3 major rallies
context: Police denied permits for three planned peaceful assemblies in Kuala Lumpur in early 2025, citing Peaceful Assembly Act 2012 restrictions.

cards.big: 3 peaceful rallies blocked by police in KL within 2 months of 2025
cards.sub: Organisers given no reasons beyond 'public order' concerns

cards.big: PAA 2012 Section 9 requires 10-day written notice for assemblies
cards.sub: Police have discretion to impose conditions or deny gatherings entirely

cards.big: Article 10(1)(b) guarantees all citizens right to assemble peaceably
cards.sub: Suhakam noted 17 assembly restrictions in 2024 annual report

cards.big: Over 5,000 Malaysians signed petitions demanding assembly reform in 2025
cards.sub: Civil society coalitions formed across ethnic and political lines

cards.big: Is prior police approval compatible with a constitutional right?
Bersih 2.0 called PAA 2012 worse than the old Police Act Section 27
